title: Liminal Houses
description: A free realistic liminal suburb map and resource pack. Empty pastel houses, quiet streets, white fences and detailed 1024x textures.
body:
![pink house](https://i.imgur.com/fk3Ucmi.jpeg)
![road](https://i.imgur.com/Hy8hg9p.jpeg)
# The map is included as an additional download in the Files section.
# Liminal Houses

A free realistic liminal map and resource pack set in an empty suburban neighborhood.

Walk through quiet streets, pastel houses, white fences, and an endless neighborhood that feels familiar.

## Includes

- Map
- Resource pack
- Realistic textures
- Empty suburban houses
- Liminal / eerie atmosphere

## Recommended

Use shaders for the best experience.
